title: Fund-Flow Sankey — ribbon tessellation
blurb: Weighted flow ribbons between two node columns — a LIVE fund-flow Sankey whose ribbons and node bars re-tessellate every frame as the flow matrix drifts: each timestep's colored-triangle geometry (triGradient@1) is replayed as an UPDATE_RANGE that overwrites the vertex buffer in place, so the flows pulse and re-route over time.
